bullets: Worked on AI/ML solutions for financial services applications.
Applied retrieval and embedding techniques to internal data pipelines.
Built and improved ML systems powering code search and intelligence at scale.
Contributed to embedding-based retrieval pipelines for the Cody AI assistant.
Researched fine-grained visual perception and puzzle-solving using DINO features.
Co-authored DiffusedDINO, currently under review at NeurIPS 2026.
Developed STAPLECAM — EM-based endoscopic segmentation integrating multiple CAM methods.
Fine-tuned ResNet-152 with cross-entropy and Otsu binarization on public endoscopy datasets.

role: B.Tech (Mech.) + M.Tech (Financial Eng.) · CSE minor · AI micro
bullets: CGPA: 8.95 / 10 — Computer Science minor and AI micro-specialization.
Gold medal at Adobe Behaviour Simulation Challenge, Inter IIT Tech Meet 12.0.
